UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, THERESA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 HAIGHT ST #C, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522. INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
